# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

format_version: "1.1"
services:
  - name: my-service
    url: http://example.com/microservice1
    routes:
      - paths:
        - /endpoint1
    upstream_url: http://example.com/microservice1
    plugins: []

  - name: my-service2
    url: http://example.com/microservice2
    routes:
      - paths:
        - /endpoint2
    upstream_url: http://example.com/microservice2
    load_balancer:
      type: roundrobin
      hash_on: none
      hash_fallback: none
    plugins: []
